Description: Nitrogen content in soil (essential macronutrient for plant growth)
Phosphorus content in soil (supports root development and energy transfer)
Potassium content in soil (improves plant resistance and metabolism)
Ambient temperature (°C) affecting crop growth conditions
Soil pH level indicating acidity or alkalinity of soil
Categorical soil type describing soil composition (e.g., sandy, clay, loamy)
Target crop class label representing recommended crop type
